context: This scenario checks structured title/author lookup and candidate handling.

checklist.name: structured lookup
checklist.description: Uses title and author parameters with the bundled helper.

checklist.name: candidate list
checklist.description: Returns several relevant Open Library candidates when available, preserving uncertainty where records differ.

checklist.name: normalized fields
checklist.description: Includes useful normalized fields such as authors, first publish year, identifiers, keys, covers, or source URLs.

checklist.name: bounded scope
checklist.description: Avoids recommendations, reviews, shopping, and download claims.
